prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021-2023理科）最低位次分别为约7622名、33863名、10868名、8230名、22853名，波动极大。2022年因广西等省份投档线暴跌近4万位 出现严重断档，2023年迅速回弹至10868名，2024年进一步回升至8230名，但2025年再次大幅后移至22853名，显示该校在甘肃理科/物理类录取稳定性较差，近两年呈\"大小年\" 交替特征。2025年22853名为最近一年基准位次；2021–2025年理科/物理类计划人数分别为47、46、47、47、45人，2026年计划增至49人，较2025年扩招 约8.9%。扩招意味着投放名额增加，在报考热度不变或上升时，位次数字趋于增大（竞争加剧），但扩招幅度有限，对位次影响温和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第53名持续上升至2026年第44名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2025年声誉评价 为偏负面，主要因投档线在全国范围内溃败，黑龙江考生以389分被录取等事件引发关注；2026年声誉仍为偏负面但程度较轻，主要涉及学校管理与校园安全舆情。抖音热度总排 名第8（高热），\"一亿河南人唯一一所211\"等话题传播广泛，报考关注度较高。历史投档异常方面，2022年（高关注）和2025年（高关注）均出现明显断档信号；郑州大学在第五轮学科评估中暂无A-及以上学科记录，但临床医学、化学、材料科学与工程等学科实力较强（B+等级），作为综合性大学学科覆盖面广，对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与郑州大学物理类招生专业（计算机类、自动化类、临床医学等）高 度契合；甘肃2026年考生总数218700人，按近年物理类占比约67%估算约146500人，较2025年121443人增加约20.6%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；省控线物理类本科批374分（2 025年），较2024年370分略有上升，整体稳定；郑州大学位于河南郑州，与甘肃同属中西部地区，地理距离适中，对甘肃考生有一定地域亲和力；该校在甘肃招 生占比约2%-3%，属中等偏小规模招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22853名、2026年扩招约8.9%、软科排名持续上升至44名、抖音高 热带来的报考关注度提升、甘肃物理类考生增加约20.6%等因素，判断2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次继续后移。预测最低录取位次约24122名，区间23622–24622名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021-2023) were approximately 7622, 33863, 10868, 8230, and 22853 respectively, showing extreme fluctuations. In 2022, due to a sharp drop in admission scores in Guangxi and other provinces, there was a severe gap of nearly 40,000 positions. In 2023, it quickly rebounded to 10868, further recovered to 8230 in 2024, but significantly shifted back to 22853 in 2025, indicating poor admission stability for this university in Gansu Science/Physics Category, with alternating "big year, small year" characteristics in recent two years. The 2025 ranking of 22853 is the baseline for the most recent year; planned enrollment numbers for Science/Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 47, 46, 47, 47, and 45 respectively, increasing to 49 in 2026, an expansion of about 8.9% compared to 2025. Expansion means more slots are available, and if application enthusiasm remains unchanged or increases, the ranking number tends to increase (intensified competition), but the expansion is limited, having a moderate impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to nationwide failures in admission score lines, such as a candidate from Heilongjiang being admitted with a score of 389, drawing attention. In 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative but to a lesser extent, mainly involving university management and campus safety public opinion. On Douyin, it ranks 8th in overall popularity (high heat), with topics like "the only 211 university for 100 million Henan people" widely spread, leading to high application attention. Historically, abnormal admission signals were evident in 2022 (high attention) and 2025 (high attention). In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhengzhou University has no records of A- or above disciplines, but disciplines like Clinical Medicine, Chemistry, and Materials Science and Engineering are relatively strong (B+ level). As a comprehensive university, it has broad discipline coverage, attracting some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have consistently high social popularity, highly matching Zhengzhou University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Automation, Clinical Medicine, etc.). In 2026, the total number of candidates in Gansu is 218,700, with an estimated 146,500 in Physics Category based on a recent proportion of about 67%, an increase of about 20.6% compared to 121,443 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch is 374 points (2025), slightly up from 370 in 2024, remaining stable overall. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, which, like Gansu, belongs to the central-western region, with moderate geographical distance, offering some regional affinity for Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 2%-3%, making it a medium-to-small scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22853, an enrollment expansion of about 8.9% in 2026, a continuous rise in Soft Science ranking to 44th, increased application attention due to high Douyin popularity, and an increase of about 20.6% in Gansu Physics Category candidates, it is judged that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to shift backward. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 24122, with a range of 23622 to 24622.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Intelligent Construction and Smart Transportation)
- Water Conservancy (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering)
- Safety Engineering

- Biological Sciences (Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Plant Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23622 to 24622, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 24500), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名从2021年第53名持续上升至2026年第44名，综合实力稳步增强，对文科考生也有一定吸引力提升；2025年声誉偏负面（投 档线溃败），2026年声誉偏负面但程度较轻；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），学校整体曝光度高。历史类招生专业（法学、中国语言文学类、新闻传播学类等）中，法学社会热度 偏热，新闻传播学类明显劝退，中文类推荐，专业热度分化明显；郑州大学在第五轮学科评估中暂无A-及以上学科记录，但法学、中国语言文学、马克思主义理 论等文科相关学科实力尚可，作为综合性大学文科专业覆盖面较全。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热（推荐），中国语言文学类推荐，新闻传播学类明显劝退（受张雪 峰言论影响较大），工商管理类分化观望。甘肃2026年考生总数218700人，按近年历史类占比约32%估算约70000人，较2025年58374人增加约20%，考生规模扩大，竞争加剧；省控 线历史类本科批412分（2025年），较2024年421分略有下降；郑州大学位于河南郑州，与甘肃同属中西部地区，对甘肃文科考生有一定地域亲和力；该校在甘肃 招生占比约2%-3%，属中等偏小规模招生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts from 2021-2023) were approximately 1395, 1403, 1489, 1603, and 5132 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 1395 and 1603 from 2021 to 2024, showing overall stability with a slight backward shift, but dropped sharply to 5132 in 2025, indicating a clear gap with a backward shift of about 3530 places, an abnormal magnitude. The 2025 ranking of 5132 serves as the baseline for the most recent year; the planned enrollment numbers for Liberal Arts/History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 19, 20, 20, 21, and 23 respectively, showing a slight annual increase; the 2026 plan is 23, unchanged from 2025. The stable enrollment plan shows no signs of expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, indicating a continuous enhancement of comprehensive strength, which also increases its appeal to Liberal Arts candidates; reputation was negative in 2025 (due to a collapse in admission scores), and remains negative but to a lesser extent in 2026; Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high overall exposure. Among the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.), Law has high social heat (recommended), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, showing clear differentiation in major popularity; Zhengzhou University has no records of A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, but its Liberal Arts-related disciplines such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Marxist Theory are moderately strong, and as a comprehensive university, it has a relatively complete coverage of Liberal Arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social heat (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (heavily influenced by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks), and Business Administration is divided and under observation. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Gansu is 218,700, with an estimated 70,000 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 32%, an increase of about 20% from 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch is 412 points (2025), slightly down from 421 points in 2024; Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, which is in the same central-western region as Gansu, offering some regional affinity for Gansu Liberal Arts candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 2%-3%, a moderately small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5132 (a low point due to a gap), the unchanged 2026 plan, the rise in Soft Science ranking, the approximately 20% increase in Gansu History Category candidates, and the differentiation in popularity of Liberal Arts majors like Law, it is judged that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward from the 2025 low point but to a limited extent. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 5162, with a range of 4662 to 5662.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4500), focus on reaching for top Liberal Arts majors like Law; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 5500), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety.
